dialogos.texto_en: (It's the second day of the trip.\n Today is the main day for sightseeing in Okinawa.)
(First, we decided to check out Kokusai dori%p-2;――\n%p; a major street near our hotel.)
Oh, wow...\nPretty lively street, isn't it?
Well, it is the main street of Naha, after all!
You can find anything\nfrom Okinawa souvenirs to local cuisine here.
Indeed, there are so many different shops.\nIt's enjoyable just to walk around and see everything.
Futaro-kun, you're still quite naive.\nIf you only look at the surface, you won't be able\nto fully appreciate the charm of Okinawa.
Huh? What do you mean?
There are many old-fashioned shops\nand renovated traditional houses\nin the narrow roads around this street.
In Okinawa, those roads are called 'sujiguwa.'
If you look for them,\nyou can find several of these kinds of roads.
I see. It would be interesting\nto explore those areas too.
We have plenty of time,\nso let's enjoy ourselves to the fullest.
By the way,\nyou guys seem to know a lot about this place.
We planned the travel itinerary,\nso it's only natural that we researched beforehand,\nright?
I suppose that's true.\nSo where are we going to explore next?
Well, that hasn't been decided yet.\nEveryone wants to go to different places.
Although, the main destination for today\nis Shurijo Castle,\nbut other than that, we have no plans.
Oh, so same as always.
I guess we could set a meeting time\nand let everyone explore on their own until then.
That's a good idea. When it's time,\nwe'll meet up and head to Shurijo Castle together.
Then, Fu-kun, why don't you come explore with me?
Futaro, you're with me, okay?\nThere's a place that the two of us want to go.
H-hey! Don't get too close to me!\nThere are people around, ya know?
Hey, can I have a word with you?
What's wrong, Ichika?
Well, it's just that there's a place that I also want \nto go with Futaro-kun.
Huh?
I mean, it's not really anything\nto be surprised about, right?\nWe have free time, and all that.
Yes, that's true.\nIt's nothing to be that surprised about.
Okay.
(What's with this situation?\n Could it be...Ichika, too?)
(Yotsuba and Itsuki\n seem to have expected this to happen...)
(Does that mean everyone else\n is already convinced, except for me?)
Now then, I wonder who Futaro-kun\nwants to spend time with?
Obviously me, right?
Futaro, let's go together, okay?
W-wait a minute.\nTo suddenly say that%p-2;――
There's no point in arguing here.
I-Itsuki?
We'd just be wasting precious time.\nIsn't that right, Uesugi-kun.
Well, I guess so.
Then, let's do this.
Uesugi-kun will be alone.\nThe rest of us will explore freely.
If we happen to run into each other along the way,\nwe'll spend time together then.
I think this is the best method, what do you think?
Yeah, I think it's good.\nThat way there'll be no hard feelings.
What's that supposed to mean?\nAre we leaving it up to fate again?
...But, in essence, this is something\nthat Futaro-kun will decide, right?
For sure.\nIt's completely different\nfrom leaving it up to fate, like that time.
Yes, indeed.
(What do they mean by 'that time'?)
Well then, I'll go check out the back streets.\nSee you later, Futaro.
I see. That's how it is, eh.
I'm going to keep walking down this street.\nFu-kun, I'll be waiting.
I've been wanting to go to the Ryukyu Glass shop\nthat is further down this street.\nI'll take a leisurely stroll there. Just so you know.
(All three of them have said where they want to go.\n In other words, they want me to follow them?)
So, that's what's going on, okay?\nSee ya!
Yotsuba, where are you going?
Huh?!
Well, I was thinking of checking out a restaurant\nthat serves Okinawan food, but...
Is that so?
Hey, Itsuki?\nWhat's going on?\nWhat's up with Ichika and everyone?
I think it's just what you predicted.
What I predicted...\nNevermind that, you too. What are you planning?
What was the idea of your proposal\nto make me choose?
I think that's also what you would predict.
I don't intend to continue this conversation any longer.\nI'll be looking for souvenirs, so please excuse me.
...She just left.
(What do they mean by 'that time'?)
(No, it's different.\n Maybe what she meant\n was that the answer is within me?)
(If it's really what I had predicted...\n Itsuki is also expecting me to find it.)
(Otherwise, there's no way she would've proposed\n something this troublesome.)
(Those who accepted the proposal\n must have understood Itsuki's intentions.)
(And, I'll try to find my own answer on this trip%p-2;――%p;)
*sigh*\nItsuki is certainly right, but...
I feel like I'm a puppet\ndancing in the palms of their hands.\nIt's so frustrating.
(Even though it's beyond frustrating...\n I have to thank them.)
(They prepared such a luxurious stage.\n I can't just sit back and do nothing.)
